title: EmailOctopus Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is EmailOctopus worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: EmailOctopus Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: EmailOctopus is simple, affordable email marketing that positions itself for budget-conscious creators and small businesses. Founded in 2014, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: EmailOctopus is a solid choice for budget-conscious creators and small businesses. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for budget-conscious creators and small businesses
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: EmailOctopus offers a free plan, with paid plans from $9/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: EmailOctopus works best for budget-conscious creators and small businesses. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Yes, EmailOctopus has a free plan supporting up to 2500 subscribers.

faq.q: What is EmailOctopus best used for?
faq.a: EmailOctopus is best for budget-conscious creators and small businesses. Its standout features include drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages.

faq.q: Does EmailOctopus have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, EmailOctopus runs an affiliate program paying 20% recurring.
